aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI assistants to confidently cite or recommend the business as a top HVAC authority.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with detailed HVAC-related questions and answers.
Expand content to include How-To guides and industry-specific expertise.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage with local audience.
Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect across all platforms, ensuring reliable local search performance.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content limits AI's ability to extract and cite their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, troubleshooting, and energy efficiency advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with schema markup to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed blog posts, case studies, and industry-specific content.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the algorithms that power tomorrow's search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and How-To schema, causing AI models to overlook their detailed service offerings.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, expand conversational content, and optimize for AI search to establish authority and capture new leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Roseville Sheet Metal, Inc.
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI search users.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your content for AI and capture more qualified leads.
business_name: Roseville Sheet Metal, Inc. - Heating & Air Conditioning
